name: Western Union
description_short: Albuquerque's Western Union at 3701 Constitution Ave NE offers check cashing and money transfer services with convenient extended hours.
description_long:
Located at 3701 Constitution Ave NE in Albuquerque, NM, this Western Union standalone location operates seven days a week from 6 AM to 10 PM. The location is accessible throughout the day and evening, making it easy to handle financial transactions whenever suits your schedule.

At this Albuquerque Western Union branch, you can send money domestically and internationally, cash checks, and access other financial services. Call 505-256-9423 to confirm specific service availability or ask questions about rates and fees for your transaction.

For Albuquerque residents needing quick access to check cashing or money transfer services, this Constitution Ave location is a reliable option. Bring a valid photo ID and required documents for your transaction. Western Union provides accessible financial services to communities across the country, and this NM location brings that service directly to your neighborhood.
pros: 24/7 online money transfer initiation available at WU.com
Extensive physical location network through major retail partnerships (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Circle K)
Multilingual support in 6 languages including Haitian Creole and Vietnamese
Multiple service options: wire transfers, bill payment, money orders, mobile top-ups, and inmate payments
Western Union Rewards program for repeat customers
Ability to track transfers in real-time
Flexible payment methods and delivery options
cons: Fees for money transfers can be high, particularly for international or large transfers
In-store pickup service is limited by agent location hours (not all locations are 24/7)
Website shows 'Orange wallet temporarily unavailable' error, indicating service disruptions
Not a deposit-taking institution, so no account balances or savings products available
Limited transparency on the website regarding fee structures
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing cash access without a bank account
Immigrants and international users sending money to family abroad
Consumers who need quick bill payment or money order services without visiting a bank
Users requiring urgent cash pickup from nearby retail locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers without traditional bank accounts who need quick access to cash, international money transfers, or bill payment services through convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that transfer fees can be substantial, and the service is transaction-based rather than providing savings, credit, or financial growth products.
services: Receiver management and delivery method updates
meta_description: Western Union at 3701 Constitution Ave NE, Albuquerque, NM. Check cashing and money transfers, open daily 6 AM–10 PM.
